_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Develop and implement automatic test tools in a CI/CD pipeline, which could include Static Application Security Test (SAST) tools, Dynamic Application Security Test (DAST) tools, Unit Test tools, Static Code Analysis (SCA) tools, etc.
reference_document_element_description: Configure and maintain CI/CD pipelines for data and AI projects, including build automation, test execution, artifact management, deployment workflows, and pipeline failure triage.
comments: DCWF task superset of WIDAI TF domain. TF-T-004 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: TF-S-005 (TF, cosine: 0.594), AI-S-016 (AI, cosine: 0.574).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.8/10 (raw 0.681). Shared vocabulary: [cd, ci, pipeline, test]. DCWF-only terms [analysis, application, automatic, code, dast, develop] vs WIDAI-only terms [ai, artifact, automation, build, configure, data] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.872 (P=0.859, R=0.885). R exceeds P by 0.026 — the WIDAI KSA's 23 words are well-captured by the DCWF element's 34 words, but the DCWF element contains broader scope not fully reflected in the matched WIDAI KSA.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.9%). "Develop and implement automatic test tools in a CI/CD pipeline, which could incl" and "Configure and maintain CI/CD pipelines for data and AI projects, including build" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.602 < STS 0.681 (gap -0.080). Cross-attention finds deeper alignment than independent encoding. The relationship depends on cross-text reasoning — concept-level mapping between [analysis, application, automatic] and [ai, artifact, automation] that bi-encoders structurally cannot capture.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 11.9%. Shared tokens: [cd, ci, pipeline, test]. DCWF-only: [analysis, application, automatic, code, dast, develop]. WIDAI-only: [ai, artifact, automation, build, configure, data].
